a_2025: Digital twin + agent-based simulation with embedded GA optimization (EV station config, policies, renewable energy)
a_joint_2025: Two-stage MILP + ADMM (joint FCS/MCS planning: queueing theory + SQP for power-traffic coordination)
a_multi-modal_2025: RSERI-EV spatial risk framework (remote sensing + kNN graph; flood/LST/NDVI/LULC resilience scoring for EV charging network)
a_quantum_2024: Quantum search-based optimization (amplitude amplification + quantum phase estimation; quadratic speedup over classical branch-and-bound for NP-hard CS placement)
a_united_2025: Simulation-integrated optimization (traffic simulation + energy modeling + mobility equity measure for equitable CS placement)
an_exact_2025: Bi-level exact Branch-and-Price-and-Cut (upper: revenue-maximizing CS placement; lower: EV user routing via Frank-Wolfe traffic assignment)
battery_swapping_2024: Simulation optimization + Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) framework + Bayesian optimization for single-station allocation; minimizes demand loss under stochastic BSS demand in city network
beyond_profit_2024: SAC (Soft Actor-Critic) DRL + LP-based safe layer for multi-objective CS pricing and scheduling (maximize profit and reputation); constraint satisfaction via linear programming projection
charging_station_2024: Improved GA (farthest-insertion heuristic + local search) for ELV CS siting with time-window and load constraints; reduces CS count 22.97%, vehicles 13.71%, algorithm complexity 46.81%; validated on C/R/RC benchmarks + Chongqing case study
electric_vehicle_2024: MINLP solved by Gurobi Branch-and-Cut; 7 cost types from CS operator and EV user perspectives; 1509 candidate POIs → 134 selected sites, 923 charging stations; Ho Chi Minh City case study
energy_management_2024: Deep learning MPC (BPNN + CNN) for HEV energy management optimization; questionnaire-validated with 1,500 consumers; predicts energy consumption across 5 road condition types; outperforms traditional control on fuel, battery, and CO2 metrics
integrating_en_2024: Spatial accessibility analysis (en route + home proximity EV charging); spatial autocorrelation + high/low access clustering; identifies CS underestimation in peripheral commuting zones vs. overestimation in urban cores; Washington Metropolitan Area
joint_optimization_2025: QUBO-based sequential optimization with Bayesian inference (quantum annealer-compatible joint EV routing and CS location)
large_language_2025: LLM-assisted MILP + ADMM (joint investment and charging assignment; spatial-temporal demand dynamics)
optimal_mixed_2025: Bi-level optimization: upper-level stochastic charging station configuration + lower-level mixed fleet dial-a-ride routing (DARP) with CO2 and capacity constraints; deterministic annealing metaheuristic
explainable_and_2025: Graph Attention Network (GAT) with SHAP/LIME explainability
joint_planning_2026: GIS-based spatial analysis (GWR + AHP multi-criteria siting) with stochastic MILP (CPLEX)
a_two-stage_2025: Two-stage heuristic-MILP (Gurobi): Monte Carlo + K-means demand simulation with iterative CP allocation
data-driven_ev_2025: ST-FCLM + M/M/C queuing theory for EV facility siting/sizing; SOS metaheuristic for battery storage allocation under stochastic demand/RES uncertainty
fairness-oriented_charging_2025: Fairness-oriented MCLP + SpoNet DRL (GRU encoder-decoder with multi-head attention); Geodetector for factor weighting; GIS spatial analysis (kernel density, SDE, ANN)
hybrid_optimization_2025: Hybrid Bender's decomp + NSGA-II (master: EVCS siting; sub: Pareto consumer pricing and re-routing; real Hefei EV demand data)
location_and_2025: Genetic algorithm + Fuzzy AHP (location optimization and fast/slow charger ratio balancing); urban metrics: parking index, public transit connectivity, land use plans
multiobjective_model_2025: Multi-objective flow refueling location model (FRLM) with epsilon constraint method; three objectives: maximize CO2 reduction, minimize total cost, minimize user charging time
multiobjective_optimization_2024: PSO multi-objective optimization (minimize installation cost + operation cost + CO2 emissions); Monte Carlo simulation for 4 EV types (L7e/M1/N1/N2) with gamma/normal battery capacity PDFs; OD gravity model + M/M/c queuing for waiting time; station-specific daily load curve forecasting; Hainan Island ring freeway (14 FCS, 17,297 EVs)
optimization_of_2025: NSGA-III multi-objective optimization (minimize construction cost, maximize user satisfaction and convenience) + TOPSIS ranking for final siting; based on activity-travel pattern analysis
optimizing_electric_2025: Deep RL + agent-based simulation (dual Q-network, hybrid reward function)
optimizing_urban_2025: MILP + location-inventory-grid model with continuous approximation (joint EV charging and battery swapping under grid and demand uncertainty)
planning_future_2025: Multi-objective bottom-up capacity allocation model (BEV/EREV/PHEV demand differentiation; 2025-2030 projection)
analyzing_locational_2025: Machine learning for EV charging locational inequality analysis (empirical case study)
reinforcement_learning_2025: Deep RL + MPC for hybrid fixed/mobile charging station planning and operation (HCSPO)
robust_charging_2025: Robust path-based optimization (E-RCRSP: joint E-MAU charging station location and routing-scheduling under demand uncertainty)
causal_spillover_2025: Quasi-experimental causal inference (staggered DiD with mobile GPS data; EVCS business spillover impact analysis)
charge-map_an_2025: Agent-based simulation + optimization (CHARGE-MAP: spatiotemporal demand simulation + CS/charger location optimization + grid stability module)
competitive_ev_2025: Bilevel optimization with queueing-based user behavior (M/M/s/K, M/Er/s/K) and user equilibrium; surrogate-based heuristic for competitive CS location
pricing_electric_2026: MILP pricing via copositive programming (CPP/COP dual for marginal EV charging prices with binary station access; revenue-adequate incentive-compatible mechanism)
regional_transportation_2026: Regional discrete event simulation (Mobiliti platform; 19M trips; spatial BEV charging demand density and equity impact analysis)
simultaneous_optimization_2026: MILP (joint electric ferry scheduling, charging infrastructure sizing, and ship battery sizing for marine electrification)
strategic_planning_2026: GIS + AHP + Weighted Overlay (multi-criteria spatial priority zoning for EVCS; five suitability criteria)
a_two-stage_2026: Two-stage stochastic MILP: Stage 1 FCS siting (ESS algorithm + long-term traffic/budget/equity) + Stage 2 dynamic MCS assignment under demand uncertainty (scenario-based)
a_spatially_2025: Spatially aware ML (SAML): MLP + spatial loss function + SHAP explainability for EVCS demand prediction
synergistic_development_2025: Conceptual/review framework (cybersecurity and functional safety co-development for Smart EVs; no optimization model)
trajectory-integrated_accessibility_2025: Trajectory-integrated accessibility metric (TI-acs): individual GPS trajectory data + spatial equity analysis (Gini index, racial disparities) for EVCS accessibility
a_data-driven_2024: Agent-based simulation (ABS) + Pareto multi-objective optimization (maximize ET user satisfaction, minimize EVCI workload variance); GPS trajectory data in GIS
a_multi-objective_2024: NSGA-II multi-objective optimization (maximize system benefits + minimum coverage level); TF-IDF urban land use + POI clustering for demand estimation
a_particle_2024: PSO + Mixed Linear Programming (minimize EV energy consumption to reach CS; horizontal distance via Haversine + positive elevation difference; validated on Newcastle upon Tyne real data)
a_two-layer_2024: Two-layer PSO: upper layer CS siting (minimize demand inconvenience + construction cost + waiting time via M/M/c queuing + Voronoi service areas) + lower layer pile capacity (maximize utilization); fuzzy logic charging demand prediction; Wujiang District real EV data
advancing_urban_2024: MADRL (TD3): cooperative Price-agent + Nudge-agent for day-ahead CS pricing and behavioral nudge optimization; Random Forest user choice model + grid-based OD mobility model; objectives: CSO revenue maximization and power curve tracking; Xi'an ride-hailing data
